sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53033" key="kamyidi/aulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καμψῐδίαυλος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[δῐ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n53033.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">turning the post</tr_> (<cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">καμπτήρ</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">so as to run the whole</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δίαυλος</foreign>: metaph., of a harp-player, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">running quickly up and down</tr_> the strings, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Χεὶρ κ</foreign>. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0377.tlg001:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Telest.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
